qa_pairs.question: What is the title of the next unit?
Where can one go to return to the lesson plan?
qa_pairs.answer: One can return to the lesson plan by following the link '^- Back to the lesson plan'.

qa_pairs.question: What is the destination of the '^- Back to the lesson plan' link?
qa_pairs.answer: The '^- Back to the lesson plan' link leads to the 'OpenACC Tutorial'.

qa_pairs.question: What is the destination of the 'Onward to the next unit: 'Profiling' ->' link?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Onward to the next unit: 'Profiling' ->' link leads to 'OpenACC Tutorial - Profiling'.
